Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Dennis G. Mesina, Esq. (415.788.8811) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL, INC'S DEMURRER/MOTION TO DISMISS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to the only cause of action alleged in the first amended complaint of plaintiff Dimitriou & Associates is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL, INC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 430.41.
